visa_types.name: Tourist
visa_types.documents_required:
All of the required documentation listed below is mandatory for all applicants, including such cases where flights, accommodation, insurance and other items may be arranged by applicant’s
                                                                        employer, travel companies or any other companies or individuals.
We therefore strongly advise that applicants provide the documents as listed below, and should not provide documents based on any other source. If documents provided are not as per the
                                                                        requirements below, this may lead to delays at the application centre, and in some cases applicants may be required to take new appointments to resubmit their application.
Instructions for applicants below 18 years:
- For all children below 18 years, both parents need to be present at the Visa Application Centre to sign the VIDEX form. Children below 12 years do not need to be present.
- All applicants below 18 years, travelling alone or with one parent must submit a signed letter of consent or authorization form and passport copy of the parent not travelling
Tourist Visa Checklist
Click here to download document checklist for Tourist visa
visa_types.visa_fees:
With effect from 11 June, the visa fees are as follow:
                                                                    

[Table:
                                                                           Tourist
                                                                    ]
Note:
A service charge of Euro 34.13- is levied per applicant by VFS over and above the Visa Fee. All fees can be paid by Credit/ Debit card.All Fees are payable in local currency at the conversion
                                                                        rate set by the German Embassy and may vary depending on the current exchange rate.
An official receipt should be obtained for all payments made. Applicants may opt for a courier-assisted facility whereby your passport and other documents will be returned via courier.
                                                                        This facility is available at an extra cost.
Please note that the visa fees are as above indicated. No other amount will be requested for the visa issuance or for urgent process for visa issuance. 
Terms and Conditions:
Kindly be informed that Logistic fee and other additional service fees are not refundable once the payment is made.
visa_types.processing_time:
Estimated processing is 2 weeks, so applicants are advised to leave enough time - between the appointment date and travel date - for the Mission to process their visa application; no
                                                                        guarantees can be given on the visa application’s return date as delays may occur.
Please be advised that due to the above-mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel.
Please be sure to submit your visa application well in advance, to avoid any inconveniences.
Every applicant can submit his/her Schengen visa application up to 3 months before the intended travel date to the Schengen Area.
In order to avoid any delays in the visa application process, it is paramount that the visa application is complete and its documents submitted are as per the Mission’s requirements (see
                                                                        Documents Required for the different visa categories).
Furthermore applicants need to consider that VFS/Mission’s closures and holidays (see View Public Holidays and Closures (https://liftassets.vfsglobal.com/png/en/deu/-/media/project/vfs_uk/shared/pdf/vac-holiday-dates/germany-dates/germany-png/png-germany.pdf) ) may extend the visa application processing time.
Therefore, VFS recommends all applicants:
- To book their appointment as soon as they know they’ll be travelling
- To ensure that their visa application’s documentation meets the Mission’s requirements
- To leave enough processing time for the Mission
The Mission may always request for additional information/documents or invite applicants for an interview during the visa application process and this may cause delays in the visa process,
                                                                        which applicants accept responsibility for.
visa_types.forms:
Application Form
For Germany every applicant needs to provide a signed printout from a Schengen visa application form (VAF).
Therefore, each applicant first needs to duly complete the online visa application form as follows:

- Click online Visa Application form (https://videx.diplo.de/videx/visum-erfassung/en/videx-kurzfristiger-aufenthalt)
- Complete all mandatory fields (marked with * and as per the passport’s details)
- Print completed online visa application form with barcode
- Click here to download guide on how to use VIDEXonline tool
- Once the completed Schengen visa application form has been printed, then applicant needs to finish the remaining steps:
- Please note that VIDEX form must be printed from PDF File and choosing the print setting under actual size. For further help refer to Print Dialog Settings file.
Important reminders when completing your VIDEX online application form:
- Surname at Birth should be your Middle Name. For example, applicant’s full name is Juan Cruz Santos, kindly enter Cruz as your Surname at Birth
- Passport details: Issuing government should be the country where it was issued i.e. Philippines whereas Issued by should only indicate the information about the issuing authority
                                                                            i.e. DFA and Issued in should be the city where it was issued i.e. NCR, Tuguegarao.
- Please also provide your email address and telephone number on the part of the VIDEX form asking for applicant’s address
- Reference person and address – please ensure that the address on field No 31.A/31. B/31.C must be name of inviting person or Hotel, email address, contact number and address must
                                                                            be in Germany and no other country
- 32. A/32. B/32.C – Please also provide the name of the organization/company, address, contact number and email address of the inviting person / organization company in Germany.
- Date of Birth – please use the German standard (Day, month, year)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Schengen visas have to be obtained from the Embassy of the country where the main purpose of travel is. Therefore, please check your travel plans before lodging your visa application
                                                                        at the German Embassy. In case of travel to multiple Schengen countries, please lodge your application at the Embassy where you will be staying the longest, OR the first point of
                                                                        entry if traveling with equal number of days.
This visa is solely for the purpose of leisure travel including vacationing, cruising, sightseeing and other recreational activities. If during any portion of their visit to the applicant
                                                                        intends to engage in business, or official duties he/she must refer to other relevant visa categories.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Schengen visas have to be obtained from the Embassy of the country where the main purpose of travel is. Therefore, please check your travel plans before lodging your visa application
                                                                        at the German Embassy. In case of travel to multiple Schengen countries, please lodge your application at the Embassy where you will be staying the longest, OR the first point of
                                                                        entry if traveling with equal number of days.
This visa is solely for the purpose of leisure travel including vacationing, cruising, sightseeing and other recreational activities. If during any portion of their visit to the applicant
                                                                        intends to engage in business, or official duties he/she must refer to other relevant visa categories.

## Visa Fees
With effect from 11 June, the visa fees are as follow:
                                                                    

[Table:
                                                                           Tourist
                                                                    ]
Note:
A service charge of Euro 34.13- is levied per applicant by VFS over and above the Visa Fee. All fees can be paid by Credit/ Debit card.All Fees are payable in local currency at the conversion
                                                                        rate set by the German Embassy and may vary depending on the current exchange rate.
An official receipt should be obtained for all payments made. Applicants may opt for a courier-assisted facility whereby your passport and other documents will be returned via courier.
                                                                        This facility is available at an extra cost.
Please note that the visa fees are as above indicated. No other amount will be requested for the visa issuance or for urgent process for visa issuance. 
Terms and Conditions:
Kindly be informed that Logistic fee and other additional service fees are not refundable once the payment is made.

## Documents Required
All of the required documentation listed below is mandatory for all applicants, including such cases where flights, accommodation, insurance and other items may be arranged by applicant’s
                                                                        employer, travel companies or any other companies or individuals.
We therefore strongly advise that applicants provide the documents as listed below, and should not provide documents based on any other source. If documents provided are not as per the
                                                                        requirements below, this may lead to delays at the application centre, and in some cases applicants may be required to take new appointments to resubmit their application.
Instructions for applicants below 18 years:
- For all children below 18 years, both parents need to be present at the Visa Application Centre to sign the VIDEX form. Children below 12 years do not need to be present.
- All applicants below 18 years, travelling alone or with one parent must submit a signed letter of consent or authorization form and passport copy of the parent not travelling
Tourist Visa Checklist
Click here to download document checklist for Tourist visa

## Photo Specifications
Click here  (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/germany/papua-new-guinea/english/pdf/checklist-for-tourist-visa.pdf)to download document checklist for Tourist visa
- The photograph must be in colour.
- It should have a white background.
- It should have a close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-90% of the photograph.
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It should be 3.5 cm X 4.5 cm.
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 6 months old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- It should be without the applicant's hair tucked behind his/her ears.
- The photograph should not have any staple marks.
- Scanned & colour photocopies would NOT be accepted.
Information for visa applicants
Only one photograph should be attached to the application, the other should be kept in the passport. Neither should have any staple pin marks disfiguring the face or background.

## Processing Time
Estimated processing is 2 weeks, so applicants are advised to leave enough time - between the appointment date and travel date - for the Mission to process their visa application; no
                                                                        guarantees can be given on the visa application’s return date as delays may occur.
Please be advised that due to the above-mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel.
Please be sure to submit your visa application well in advance, to avoid any inconveniences.
Every applicant can submit his/her Schengen visa application up to 3 months before the intended travel date to the Schengen Area.
In order to avoid any delays in the visa application process, it is paramount that the visa application is complete and its documents submitted are as per the Mission’s requirements (see
                                                                        Documents Required for the different visa categories).
Furthermore applicants need to consider that VFS/Mission’s closures and holidays (see View Public Holidays and Closures (https://liftassets.vfsglobal.com/png/en/deu/-/media/project/vfs_uk/shared/pdf/vac-holiday-dates/germany-dates/germany-png/png-germany.pdf) ) may extend the visa application processing time.
Therefore, VFS recommends all applicants:
- To book their appointment as soon as they know they’ll be travelling
- To ensure that their visa application’s documentation meets the Mission’s requirements
- To leave enough processing time for the Mission
The Mission may always request for additional information/documents or invite applicants for an interview during the visa application process and this may cause delays in the visa process,
                                                                        which applicants accept responsibility for.

## Download Forms
Application Form
For Germany every applicant needs to provide a signed printout from a Schengen visa application form (VAF).
Therefore, each applicant first needs to duly complete the online visa application form as follows:

- Click online Visa Application form (https://videx.diplo.de/videx/visum-erfassung/en/videx-kurzfristiger-aufenthalt)
- Complete all mandatory fields (marked with * and as per the passport’s details)
- Print completed online visa application form with barcode
- Click here to download guide on how to use VIDEXonline tool
- Once the completed Schengen visa application form has been printed, then applicant needs to finish the remaining steps:
- Please note that VIDEX form must be printed from PDF File and choosing the print setting under actual size. For further help refer to Print Dialog Settings file.
Important reminders when completing your VIDEX online application form:
- Surname at Birth should be your Middle Name. For example, applicant’s full name is Juan Cruz Santos, kindly enter Cruz as your Surname at Birth
- Passport details: Issuing government should be the country where it was issued i.e. Philippines whereas Issued by should only indicate the information about the issuing authority
                                                                            i.e. DFA and Issued in should be the city where it was issued i.e. NCR, Tuguegarao.
- Please also provide your email address and telephone number on the part of the VIDEX form asking for applicant’s address
- Reference person and address – please ensure that the address on field No 31.A/31. B/31.C must be name of inviting person or Hotel, email address, contact number and address must
                                                                            be in Germany and no other country
- 32. A/32. B/32.C – Please also provide the name of the organization/company, address, contact number and email address of the inviting person / organization company in Germany.
- Date of Birth – please use the German standard (Day, month, year)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is for those who intend to visit their family or friends who legally reside in Germany. If during any portion of their visit to Germany the applicant intends to engage in business,
                                                                        or official duties he/she must refer to other relevant visa categories.
Visit Visa (Unmarried Couple)
Unmarried couples are no longer required to have lived together or met in Germany however they still need to have met in person even once (in any country)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is for those who intend to visit their family or friends who legally reside in Germany. If during any portion of their visit to Germany the applicant intends to engage in business,
                                                                        or official duties he/she must refer to other relevant visa categories.
Visit Visa (Unmarried Couple)
Unmarried couples are no longer required to have lived together or met in Germany however they still need to have met in person even once (in any country)

## Visa Fees
With effect from 11 June, the visa fees are as follow:
                                                                    

[Table:
                                                                           Visit Family/ Friends
                                                                    ]
Note:
A service charge of Euro 34.13- is levied per applicant by VFS over and above the Visa Fee. All fees can be paid by Credit/ Debit card.All Fees are payable in local currency at the conversion
                                                                        rate set by the German Embassy and may vary depending on the current exchange rate.
An official receipt should be obtained for all payments made. Applicants may opt for a courier-assisted facility whereby your passport and other documents will be returned via courier.
                                                                        This facility is available at an extra cost.
Please note that the visa fees are as above indicated. No other amount will be requested for the visa issuance or for urgent process for visa issuance. 
Terms and Conditions:
Kindly be informed that Logistic fee and other additional service fees are not refundable once the payment is made.

## Documents Required
All of the required documentation listed below is mandatory for all applicants, including such cases where flights, accommodation, insurance and other items may be arranged by applicant’s
                                                                        employer, travel companies or any other companies or individuals.
We therefore strongly advise that applicants provide the documents as listed below, and should not provide documents based on any other source. If documents provided are not as per the
                                                                        requirements below, this may lead to delays at the application centre, and in some cases applicants may be required to take new appointments to resubmit their application.
Instructions for applicants below 18 years:
- For all children below 18 years, both parents need to be present at the Visa Application Centre to sign the VIDEX form. Children below 12 years do not need to be present.
- All applicants below 18 years, travelling alone or with one parent must submit a signed letter of consent or authorization form and passport copy of the parent not travelling
Visit Visa Checklist
Click here  to download document checklist Visit visa
Click here to download document checklist for visit visa (for Unmarried Couples)
Click here to download Relationship Declaration for visit visa Unmarried Couple

## Photo Specifications
 Click here to view a sample biometric photo
- The photograph must be in colour.
- It should have a white background.
- It should have a close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-90% of the photograph.
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It should be 3.5 cm X 4.5 cm.
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 6 months old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- It should be without the applicant's hair tucked behind his/her ears.
- The photograph should not have any staple marks.
- Scanned & colour photocopies would NOT be accepted.
Information for visa applicants
Only one photograph should be attached to the application, the other should be kept in the passport. Neither should have any staple pin marks disfiguring the face or background.

## Processing Time
Estimated processing is 2 weeks, so applicants are advised to leave enough time - between the appointment date and travel date - for the Mission to process their visa application; no
                                                                        guarantees can be given on the visa application’s return date as delays may occur.
Please be advised that due to the above-mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel.
Please be sure to submit your visa application well in advance, to avoid any inconveniences.
Every applicant can submit his/her Schengen visa application up to 3 months before the intended travel date to the Schengen Area.
In order to avoid any delays in the visa application process, it is paramount that the visa application is complete and its documents submitted are as per the Mission’s requirements (see
                                                                        Documents Required for the different visa categories).
Furthermore applicants need to consider that VFS/Mission’s closures and holidays (see View Public Holidays and Closures (https://liftassets.vfsglobal.com/png/en/deu/-/media/project/vfs_uk/shared/pdf/vac-holiday-dates/germany-dates/germany-png/png-germany.pdf) ) may extend the visa application processing time.
Therefore, VFS recommends all applicants:
- To book their appointment as soon as they know they’ll be travelling
- To ensure that their visa application’s documentation meets the Mission’s requirements
- To leave enough processing time for the Mission
The Mission may always request for additional information/documents or invite applicants for an interview during the visa application process and this may cause delays in the visa process,
                                                                        which applicants accept responsibility for.

## Download Forms
Application Form
For Germany every applicant needs to provide a signed printout from a Schengen visa application form (VAF).
Therefore, each applicant first needs to duly complete the online visa application form as follows:
- Click online Visa Application form (https://videx.diplo.de/videx/visum-erfassung/en/videx-kurzfristiger-aufenthalt)
- Complete all mandatory fields (marked with * and as per the passport’s details)
- Print completed online visa application form with barcode
- Click here to download guide on how to use VIDEXonline tool
- Once the completed Schengen visa application form has been printed, then applicant needs to finish the remaining steps:
- Please note that VIDEX form must be printed from PDF File and choosing the print setting under actual size. For further help refer to Print Dialog Settings file.
Important reminders when completing your VIDEX online application form:
- Surname at Birth should be your Middle Name. For example, applicant’s full name is Juan Cruz Santos, kindly enter Cruz as your Surname at Birth
- Passport details: Issuing government should be the country where it was issued i.e. Philippines whereas Issued by should only indicate the information about the issuing authority
                                                                            i.e. DFA and Issued in should be the city where it was issued i.e. NCR, Tuguegarao.
- Please also provide your email address and telephone number on the part of the VIDEX form asking for applicant’s address
- Reference person and address – please ensure that the address on field No 31.A/31. B/31.C must be name of inviting person or Hotel, email address, contact number and address must
                                                                            be in Germany and no other country
- 32. A/32. B/32.C – Please also provide the name of the organization/company, address, contact number and email address of the inviting person / organization company in Germany.
- Date of Birth – please use the German standard (Day, month, year)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
 Applicants who intend to travel for business purposes, i.e. visiting a company to have meetings, to make business deals, to train or other work related activities can apply for a Business
                                                                        visa.
                                                                    
Every Business visa application has to be confirmed by an invitation letter from a company based in Germany.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
 Applicants who intend to travel for business purposes, i.e. visiting a company to have meetings, to make business deals, to train or other work related activities can apply for a Business
                                                                        visa.
                                                                    
Every Business visa application has to be confirmed by an invitation letter from a company based in Germany.

## Visa Fees
With effect from 11 June, the visa fees are as follow:
                                                                    

[Table:
                                                                           Business
                                                                    ]
Note:
A service charge of Euro 34.13- is levied per applicant by VFS over and above the Visa Fee. All fees can be paid by Credit/ Debit card.All Fees are payable in local currency at the conversion
                                                                        rate set by the German Embassy and may vary depending on the current exchange rate.
An official receipt should be obtained for all payments made. Applicants may opt for a courier-assisted facility whereby your passport and other documents will be returned via courier.
                                                                        This facility is available at an extra cost.
Please note that the visa fees are as above indicated. No other amount will be requested for the visa issuance or for urgent process for visa issuance. 
Terms and Conditions:
Kindly be informed that Logistic fee and other additional service fees are not refundable once the payment is made.

## Documents Required
All of the required documentation listed below is mandatory for all applicants, including such cases where flights, accommodation, insurance and other items may be arranged by applicant’s
                                                                        employer, travel companies or any other companies or individuals.
We therefore strongly advise that applicants provide the documents as listed below, and should not provide documents based on any other source. If documents provided are not as per the
                                                                        requirements below, this may lead to delays at the application centre, and in some cases applicants may be required to take new appointments to resubmit their application.
Instructions for applicants below 18 years:
- For all children below 18 years, both parents need to be present at the Visa Application Centre to sign the VIDEX form. Children below 12 years do not need to be present.
- All applicants below 18 years, travelling alone or with one parent must submit a signed letter of consent or authorization form and passport copy of the parent not travelling
Business Visa Checklist
 Click here to download document checklist for Business visa
Click here to download this form needs to filled up and signed by the host /inviting company in Germany.

## Photo Specifications
 Click here to view a sample biometric photo 
- The photograph must be in colour.
- It should have a white background.
- It should have a close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-90% of the photograph.
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It should be 3.5 cm X 4.5 cm.
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 6 months old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- It should be without the applicant's hair tucked behind his/her ears.
- The photograph should not have any staple marks.
- Scanned & colour photocopies would NOT be accepted.
Information for visa applicants
Only one photograph should be attached to the application, the other should be kept in the passport. Neither should have any staple pin marks disfiguring the face or background.

## Processing Time
Estimated processing is 2 weeks, so applicants are advised to leave enough time - between the appointment date and travel date - for the Mission to process their visa application; no
                                                                        guarantees can be given on the visa application’s return date as delays may occur.
Please be advised that due to the above-mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel.
Please be sure to submit your visa application well in advance, to avoid any inconveniences.
Every applicant can submit his/her Schengen visa application up to 3 months before the intended travel date to the Schengen Area.
In order to avoid any delays in the visa application process, it is paramount that the visa application is complete and its documents submitted are as per the Mission’s requirements (see
                                                                        Documents Required for the different visa categories).
Furthermore applicants need to consider that VFS/Mission’s closures and holidays (see View Public Holidays and Closures (https://liftassets.vfsglobal.com/png/en/deu/-/media/project/vfs_uk/shared/pdf/vac-holiday-dates/germany-dates/germany-png/png-germany.pdf) ) may extend the visa application processing time.
Therefore, VFS recommends all applicants:
- To book their appointment as soon as they know they’ll be travelling
- To ensure that their visa application’s documentation meets the Mission’s requirements
- To leave enough processing time for the Mission
The Mission may always request for additional information/documents or invite applicants for an interview during the visa application process and this may cause delays in the visa process,
                                                                        which applicants accept responsibility for.

## Download Forms
Application Form
For Germany every applicant needs to provide a signed printout from a Schengen visa application form (VAF).
Therefore, each applicant first needs to duly complete the online visa application form as follows:

- Click online Visa Application form (https://videx.diplo.de/videx/visum-erfassung/en/videx-kurzfristiger-aufenthalt)
- Complete all mandatory fields (marked with * and as per the passport’s details)
- Print completed online visa application form with barcode
- Click here to download guide on how to use VIDEX online tool
- Once the completed Schengen visa application form has been printed, then applicant needs to finish the remaining steps:
- Please note that VIDEX form must be printed from PDF File and choosing the print setting under actual size. For further help refer to Print Dialog Settings file.
Important reminders when completing your VIDEX online application form:
- Surname at Birth should be your Middle Name. For example, applicant’s full name is Juan Cruz Santos, kindly enter Cruz as your Surname at Birth
- Passport details: Issuing government should be the country where it was issued i.e. Philippines whereas Issued by should only indicate the information about the issuing authority
                                                                            i.e. DFA and Issued in should be the city where it was issued i.e. NCR, Tuguegarao.
- Please also provide your email address and telephone number on the part of the VIDEX form asking for applicant’s address
- Reference person and address – please ensure that the address on field No 31.A/31. B/31.C must be name of inviting person or Hotel, email address, contact number and address must
                                                                            be in Germany and no other country
- 32. A/32. B/32.C – Please also provide the name of the organization/company, address, contact number and email address of the inviting person / organization company in Germany.
- Date of Birth – please use the German standard (Day, month, year)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A Trade Fair/Exhibitor’s visa is applicable for those travelling to attend or participate as an Exhibitor in the trade fair. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days;
                                                                        such visas can only be issued to travelers not being paid for work by an entity in Germany. If the applicant intends to undertake paid work in Germany he/she will need to obtain the
                                                                        proper Work visa. Kindly refer to the information sheet for the required documents.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A Trade Fair/Exhibitor’s visa is applicable for those travelling to attend or participate as an Exhibitor in the trade fair. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days;
                                                                        such visas can only be issued to travelers not being paid for work by an entity in Germany. If the applicant intends to undertake paid work in Germany he/she will need to obtain the
                                                                        proper Work visa. Kindly refer to the information sheet for the required documents.

## Visa Fees
With effect from 11 June, the visa fees are as follow:
                                                                    

[Table:
                                                                           Visitors or Exhibitors of fairs
                                                                    ]
Note:
 Visa Fee for EXHIBITOR’S will be waived if they are able to present Exhibitor’s pass or other proof.
A service charge of Euro 34.13- is levied per applicant by VFS over and above the Visa Fee. All fees can be paid by Credit/ Debit card.All Fees are payable in local currency at the conversion
                                                                        rate set by the German Embassy and may vary depending on the current exchange rate.
An official receipt should be obtained for all payments made. Applicants may opt for a courier-assisted facility whereby your passport and other documents will be returned via courier.
                                                                        This facility is available at an extra cost.
Please note that the visa fees are as above indicated. No other amount will be requested for the visa issuance or for urgent process for visa issuance. 
Terms and Conditions:
Kindly be informed that Logistic fee and other additional service fees are not refundable once the payment is made.

## Documents Required
All of the required documentation listed below is mandatory for all applicants, including such cases where flights, accommodation, insurance and other items may be arranged by applicant’s
                                                                        employer, travel companies or any other companies or individuals.
We therefore strongly advise that applicants provide the documents as listed below, and should not provide documents based on any other source. If documents provided are not as per the
